content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.38%, VIX +2.24% to 18.71, Bank Nifty -0.59% — mild risk-off morning despite strong individual stock moves on Q4 prints. Heavy earnings/event flow this week (HAL May 14, GESHIP May 14, FLUOROCHEM May 13, ANANTRAJ May 11, LAURUSLABS ex-div May 8). Position book is broadly green +0.45% with multiple winners; priority is trailing SLs to protect gains, not adding new exposure into elevated VIX.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Holding +6% with strong Q4 thesis intact (PAT +19%, NIM expansion, GNPA <1%). Current SL 1025 is already at breakeven-plus zone (~1.7% below CMP 1042.50, satisfying 1% trail-gap). Maintaining as-is — no MODIFY needed actually. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Reconsidering: SL 1025 already locks in +4.2% gain and sits 1.7% below CMP — adequate trail-gap. No-op MODIFY would be wasted signal. Hold thesis intact, target 1110 still ~6.5% away."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.7%, SL 119 is 2.3% below CMP 121.73 — within range. Geopolitical hedge thesis still valid; gold consolidating after correction. Hold to SL or reassess on any Hormuz/Iran flare."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.40,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 23.85 is ABOVE CMP 24.03 (only 0.7% below) — would trigger on normal noise. Loosening to 23.40 (2.6% below CMP) is NOT permitted (can only tighten). Withdrawing this MODIFY — switching to HOLD. SL too tight but rules forbid loosening."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL 23.85 vs CMP 24.03 — gap is 0.7%, below the 1% trail-gap floor. Cannot loosen SL per rules. Accept that this position may stop out on noise; if it does, SL fires above entry (locking small gain). Thesis intact on pharma sector strength."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.8%, hit ATH 1757 today on Q4 beat (PAT +9.4%) + heavy institutional inflows (Capital Group +Rs 7,400 cr). SL 1715 already at breakeven+0.9%, sits 1.9% below CMP 1747.90 — adequate trail-gap. Raising target from 1780 to 1800 (more room post-ATH); SL unchanged. R:R from CMP: risk 32.90 vs reward 52.10 = 1.58."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Board meeting May 14 (7 trading days) for FY26 results + dividend = binary catalyst within 3 sessions of decision horizon. Position -1.1% on -3.62% intraday weakness. Per binary-event rule: positions above 5% capital should not hold through earnings at full size. GESHIP is ~4.6% of book (just below 5%) but combined with -3.6% intraday tape weakness signaling tanker-rate compression on Iran de-escalation noise, exiting cleanly at -1.1% beats binary tail. Same playbook as TORNTPOWER/ADANIPOWER prior cycles — small loss on closed door beats earnings tail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.2%, SL 13400 is 0.6% below CMP 13493 — too tight per 1% gap rule, but cannot loosen. Record April sales +33% YoY thesis intact; Q4 PAT margin pressure already known at entry. Will stop out on any further weakness, otherwise hold. Cannot MODIFY tighter (already too tight)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.6%. SL 204 is 0.5% below CMP 205.07 — extremely tight but dividend ex-date pending and Q4 thesis (PAT +68%, GNPA -140bps) intact. Cannot loosen. If stopped, exits at -2.4%; if holds, target 220 = +5.3% upside. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4850.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5%, HAL surged +6.35% to 4614 on heavy volume. SL 4575 = breakeven, sits 0.85% below CMP — borderline tight but Q4 results May 14 is binary event in ~7 sessions. Per binary rule: tightening SL acceptable as event approaches (option b). Raising target from 4750 to 4850 to give room post-momentum. SL unchanged at breakeven — already protective. Will reassess closer to May 14; may exit pre-event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2% with Q4 results May 11 (4 trading days). Critical: research flagged ED PMLA RAID April 24-25 — governance overhang per Rule 13. Position exists but I should NOT add. Given binary May 11 results within 3 sessions threshold + governance overhang, leaning toward EXIT. SL 506 = entry, sits 2.0% below CMP — adequate. Will hold one more session and exit before May 11 results. If today closes weak, exit immediately. Reasoning: governance overhang + upcoming binary results = should not hold full size. Keeping position only because SL at breakeven caps downside."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "reasoning": "SL adequately placed at +4.2% lock-in, 1.7% gap to CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL provides 2.3% buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "reasoning": "SL tight (0.7% gap) but cannot loosen per rules."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "Target raised to 1800 post-ATH; SL unchanged at breakeven+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Board meeting May 14 binary risk + intraday -3.6% weakness on Iran de-escalation — exit at small -1.1% loss."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "SL too tight to gap but cannot loosen; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "SL tight; Q4 thesis strong, dividend pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; target raised to 4850. Reassess pre-May-14 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 506.00,
      "reasoning": "Will likely exit before May 11 results given ED overhang + binary risk. SL at breakeven caps downside this session."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL, LALPATHLAB, LAURUSLABS, HFCL, FLUOROCHEM all had massive Q4-driven gap-ups; all extended and chasing into elevated VIX with binary calendars (FLUOROCHEM May 13, LAURUSLABS ex-div May 8) is poor R:R. SYNGENE volume signal interesting but no fundamental catalyst yet — keep watching. VEDL post-demerger price discovery still volatile — pass. MOTILALOFS, TATATECH, CESC, ADANIGREEN, PETRONET — no entries today; high VIX + book already 47% deployed across 9 names + multiple binary events across the week argue for capital preservation, not new admissions.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is +0.45% today on 9 positions, 47% deployed, 53% cash. Multiple positions have SLs uncomfortably close to CMP (PHARMABEES, MARUTI, BANDHANBNK) but cannot be loosened per rules — accept that some may stop out on noise. Key risk: 4 positions have binary events within 7 sessions (HAL May 14, GESHIP May 14, ANANTRAJ May 11, BANDHANBNK dividend). EXITing GESHIP today reduces binary tail. Will exit ANANTRAJ before May 11 and reassess HAL/BANDHANBNK closer to events. No new entries today: VIX elevated, book full of binary risk, fresh chasers (BHEL +9%, LALPATHLAB +15%, HFCL +11%) are all gap-ups already extended. Capital preservation > activity."
}
